lemmas: (x : α) (xs : List α) (ih : takeWhile (fun x => decide True) xs = xs) : takeWhile (fun x => decide True) (x :: xs) = x :: xs

(ih : ∀ (xs : List α) (ys : List β), drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)) (x : α) (n : ℕ) (xs : List α) : drop (n + 1) (zip' (x :: xs) []) = zip' (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)) (drop (n + 1) [])

(ys : List α) (n : ℕ) : drop n [] = []
